variant: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

request.message: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

response_body.response: don't have a week-by-week minoxidil timeline in your current docs. the evidence just says results take several months of consistency, but no specific progression breakdown. here's what i can tell you: minoxidil works on blood flow and follicle stimulation, so you're looking at a slow ramp. most people see shedding in weeks 2-4 (that's normal, old hairs cycling out), then regrowth starts around week 8-12. consistency matters more than the exact week-by-week. if you want me to pull a general 8-week structure based on standard minoxidil timelines, i can do that. or if you've got a specific concern about application, dosing, or what to expect in the first month, ask and i'll check what's in your protocol.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
